preferences.title: Notification preferences
preferences.subtitle: Choose how you want to be notified about account activity, market events, and platform updates.

eventDescriptions.Welcome: Welcome message when you join ETStockX.
eventDescriptions.BuyRequestReceived: Alerts when a new buy request is received.
eventDescriptions.SellRequestReceived: Alerts when a new sell request is received.
eventDescriptions.ProposalSent: Alerts for new trade proposals or counter-offers.
eventDescriptions.TermsAgreed: Notifications when trade terms are agreed.
eventDescriptions.OrderStatusChanged: Updates when an order status changes.
eventDescriptions.MessageReceived: Notifications for incoming chat and system messages.
eventDescriptions.BrokerVerified: Updates about your broker verification status.
eventDescriptions.ListingModerated: Notices when a listing is approved or rejected.
eventDescriptions.Security: Unusual login activity, password changes, and other security events.

feed.title: Notifications
feed.filteredHint: Unread and Read tabs show your most recent notifications (up to 100). Use All for full history with pages.

home.heroBadge: Regulated by the Ethiopian Capital Market Authority
home.heroSubtitle: Securely browse stock listings and connect with verified institutional brokers. Professional mediation for the modern investor.
home.feature1Body: Direct access to ECMA-licensed professionals, ensuring every transaction is handled with institutional integrity.
home.feature2Body: Real-time request tracking and secure document exchange without the unnecessary complexity of day-trading terminals.
home.feature3Body: Clear, detailed listings for CBE, Ethio Telecom, and emerging enterprises. Information parity for all investors.
home.processSubtitle: Our platform streamlines the connection between investors and licensed financial intermediaries.
home.processStep1Body: Browse available stock opportunities with full company disclosures and indicative pricing.
home.processStep2Body: Express interest through our secure platform to be assigned a verified institutional intermediary.
home.processStep3Body: Discuss specific terms, finalize documentation, and execute through your chosen broker safely.
home.featuredSubtitle: Direct institutional listings from Ethiopia's largest enterprises.
home.listing1Body: The leading bank in Ethiopia, offering a historic opportunity for private shareholding.
home.listing2Body: East Africa's telecommunications giant entering its next phase of public expansion.
home.ctaBannerSubtitle: Join ETStockX to access professional market coordination and secure your place in Ethiopia's growing financial landscape.
home.footerLegal: © {year} ETStockX. Licensed by the Ethiopian Capital Market Authority. All investments involve risk. Broker services are provided by independent licensed institutions.
home.brokersPageIntro: Verified institutional intermediaries on the platform.

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to access your portal.
auth.loginInvalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email or password and try again.
auth.mfaTotpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to secure your account.
auth.mfaTotpHint: Open Google or Microsoft Authenticator to see your one-time password.
auth.mfaIncorrect: Incorrect code. Please check your authenticator app and try again.
auth.mfaHelpBody: Use the current code from your authenticator app (they change about every 30 seconds). Ensure your device clock is set automatically. If you lost your device, use “Lost access to your device?” or contact support.
auth.loginFooterCopyright: © {year} ETStockX. Licensed by the Ethiopian Capital Market Authority.
auth.loginAsideValue1Body: Access a curated network of licensed brokerage firms regulated by the ECMA.
auth.loginAsideValue2Body: Monitor every step of your submission with real-time status updates and direct messaging.
auth.loginAsideValue3Body: Explore official listings with transparent data to make informed investment decisions.
auth.loginSocialProof: Trusted by thousands of Ethiopian investors
auth.registerFormSubheading: Choose your role to get started with secure onboarding.
auth.registerRoleSelectionSub: Select your role to get started with ETStockX.
auth.registerRoleRequired: Please select a role to continue
auth.registerClientFormSubtitle: Join ETStockX to start managing your institutional assets.
auth.registerBrokerFormSubtitle: Enter your institution details and upload verification documents.
auth.registerBrokerProfessionalSubtitle: Complete the institutional onboarding to start trading on the EtStockX platform.
auth.registerBrokerDropzoneTitle: Click or drag files to upload
auth.registerBrokerDropzoneHint: Support for PDF, PNG, JPG (max 10MB per file).
auth.registerBrokerLegalLead: By submitting this application, you agree to the EtStockX
auth.registerBrokerDocRequired: Upload at least one verification document.
auth.registerBrokerInvalidDoc: Each document must be a PDF, PNG, or JPEG file.
auth.registerBrokerFileTooLarge: Each file must be 10MB or smaller.
auth.registerBrokerTotalSizeExceeded: Total document size must be 100MB or less.
auth.registerBrokerTooManyDocs: You can upload up to {max} documents.
auth.registerPasswordRulesClient: Minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit, and one special character.
auth.registerDetailsSubheading: Enter your details below. You can switch roles anytime before submitting.
auth.registerHeroFooter: © {year} ETStockX. Licensed by ECMA. All rights reserved.
auth.registerValue1Body: Every broker is rigorously vetted for compliance and reliability.
auth.registerValue2Body: Real-time status updates on all your investment queries.
auth.registerValue3Body: Explore localized listings with unmatched transparency.
auth.roleInvestorDesc: Individual or institutional investor looking to browse and purchase available shares.
auth.roleBrokerDesc: Certified financial institution authorized to manage listings and execute trades.
auth.roleSellerDesc: Manage sell-side requests and profile details.
auth.fullNameBilingualLabel: Full Name / Organization Name (Amharic: ሙሉ ስም)
auth.passwordRulesHint: At least 8 characters, including an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number, and a special character (!@#$ etc.).
auth.fullNameTooLong: Full name must be at most 255 characters.
auth.licenseRequired: License number is required for broker and dealer accounts.
auth.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.registerSuccess: Check your email to verify your account.
auth.verifyLinkSentLead: We've sent a verification link to your email address.
auth.verifyLinkExpiryBanner: The verification link expires in 24 hours.
auth.verifySpamFolderHint: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or contact our support team.
auth.verifyPageSubtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}. Enter it below to secure your account.
auth.verifyResendIn: You can request another email in {time}.
auth.verifyResendSuccess: A new code has been sent.
auth.verifyInvalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
auth.verifyMissingEmail: We couldn't find your email. Register or open the link from your inbox.
auth.verifyAsideValue1Body: Direct access to certified Ethiopian market professionals.
auth.verifyAsideValue2Body: Real-time updates on your stock purchase and sale requests.
auth.verifyAsideValue3Body: Professional insights and transparent listing explorers.
auth.verifyAsideFooter: © {year} ETStockX. Licensed by ECMA. All rights reserved.
auth.verifySuccess: Your email is verified. You can sign in.
auth.confirmEmailMissingParamsBody: This page needs both the verification token and email address from your registration message. Use the button in your email again, or register to receive a new link.
auth.confirmEmailSuccessBody: Your email address has been successfully verified.
auth.confirmEmailBrokerPendingBody: Your account is currently pending Admin verification. Please check your email to activate your account.
auth.confirmEmailBrokerPendingExpiry: The verification link expires in 24 hours.
auth.confirmEmailErrorBody: The verification link is invalid or has expired after 24 hours. For security purposes, each link can only be used once.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a secure reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent. Please check your spam folder.
auth.forgotPasswordInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Your new password must be different from previously used passwords.
auth.resetPasswordExpiryHint: The reset link expires after one hour and can only be used once. Request a new link from Forgot password if needed.
auth.resetPasswordMissingTokenBody: This page needs the reset token from your email. Open the link from your message again, or request a new reset email.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessBody: Password reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
auth.acceptInviteSubtitle: Accept the invitation, create your password, and activate your admin access in one step.
auth.acceptInviteHelper: Use a strong password that meets the platform policy. Submitting this form accepts the invitation and activates the account.
auth.acceptInviteSuccessBody: Your invitation has been accepted and your administrator account is now active. You can sign in with the password you just created.
auth.acceptInviteMissingTokenBody: This invitation link is incomplete or invalid. Open the invitation email again or request a fresh link from your Super Admin.
auth.acceptInviteExpiryHint: Invitation links can expire or be revoked. If this link no longer works, ask the sender to issue a new invitation.
auth.acceptInviteAsideValue1Body: Your administrator access is created only after the signed invitation token is accepted.
auth.acceptInviteAsideValue2Body: Set your own password immediately so the account starts with credentials known only to you.
auth.acceptInviteAsideValue3Body: Once activated, you can sign in to the admin portal and continue with two-factor setup if required.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.notActivated: Complete your profile to unlock trading actions.
dashboard.stubTrade: Trading workspace will appear when the Trade module is available.
dashboard.stubMarket: Listings and search will appear when the Market module is available.

dashboard.overviewSubtitle: Real-time order flow and market activity.
dashboard.marketUpdateBody: Institutional buy-side activity detected across major banking tickers in today’s session.
dashboard.actionRequiredSubtitle: High-priority requests requiring immediate broker review.

listings.subtitle: Manage all your published stock listings.
listings.empty: No listings found for the selected filters.

stub.lead: This section will be available in an upcoming release.

clients.listSubtitle: People who appear in your incoming request queue. Open trade history to see every request you have handled for them.
clients.listEmpty: No clients found yet. When buy or sell requests arrive, they will appear here.
clients.emptyTitle: No history with this client yet.
clients.emptyDescription: Requests you handle for this client will appear here.
clients.showingTotalRequests: Showing {count, plural, one {# request} other {# requests}}
clients.statsPartialHint: Buy, sell, filled, and rejected counts reflect the current page of results. Use pagination to review additional requests.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Your conversations with clients.
messages.emptySubtitle: Conversations will appear here when clients reach out.
messages.unreadMessages: {count, plural, one {# unread message} other {# unread messages}}

thread.deleteConversationUnavailable: Deleting conversations is not supported by the server yet.
thread.empty: No messages in this conversation yet. Send the first one below.
thread.attachmentTooLarge: Attachments must be 10 MB or smaller.
thread.searchPrompt: Type to search messages in this conversation.

compose.title: New message
compose.subtitle: Start a conversation with a client or fellow broker.
compose.searchMinChars: Type at least {count} characters to search.
compose.emptyClients: You have no clients to message yet. Recipients appear here once they submit a buy or sell request.
compose.selectRecipientHint: Pick a recipient above to start the conversation.

profile.figmaSubtitle: This information is visible to clients on your public profile and listings.
profile.settingsAreaSubtitle: Manage security and preferences for your broker account.
profile.acceptingCardDesc: Control your visibility to potential investors and clients.
profile.logoHint: JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 5 MB.
profile.stubLead: This section will be available in an upcoming release.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Manage and monitor where you are currently signed in.
sessions.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
sessions.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
sessions.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
sessions.confirmBody: This will immediately revoke all sessions except your current device. Any broker account signed in elsewhere will be logged out.
sessions.securityBody: Revoke any session you do not recognize. If you suspect account compromise, change your password immediately and enable Two-Factor Auth.

changePassword.cardDescription: Confirm your current password, then choose a new one that meets platform security rules.
changePassword.rulesHint: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
changePassword.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

twoFactor.pageDescription: Protect your broker account with a time-based code from an authenticator app. Recommended for anyone handling client orders and sensitive listing data.
twoFactor.bannerDisabled: MFA is currently disabled. Your account is at higher risk. Enable two-factor authentication to protect your sensitive broker data.
twoFactor.bannerEnabled: Two-factor authentication is on. Your account is protected with TOTP (time-based one-time passwords) at sign-in.
twoFactor.disableCardBody: Disabling 2FA removes the extra step at login. Only continue if you understand the security impact.
twoFactor.disablePasswordRequired: Enter your portal password to disable 2FA.
twoFactor.methodBody: Use Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, or any compatible TOTP app.
twoFactor.recoveryBody: Recovery codes help you regain access if you lose your phone. Store them somewhere safe and offline.
twoFactor.recoveryUnavailable: Recovery code download is not available from the API yet.
twoFactor.asideBody: Layer strong authentication on top of encrypted sessions and monitored access. Brokers are high-value targets—2FA materially reduces account takeover risk.
twoFactor.setupCardSubtitle: Confirm your identity, link an authenticator app, and verify the first code.
twoFactor.setupPasswordHint: Your password is sent to start MFA setup. MFA stays off until you enter a valid app code on the next step. Your password is not kept in the browser after you leave this page.
twoFactor.scanTitle: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
twoFactor.scanBody: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or Authy) and scan the code below to link your account.
twoFactor.otpHint: Enter the code from your app. The server will verify it and turn on MFA for your account.
twoFactor.otpIncomplete: Enter all 6 digits from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.otpInvalid: That code was not accepted. Try a new code from your app.
twoFactor.secretInvalid: The secret from the server could not be read. Go back and try again, or contact support.
twoFactor.totpFooter: Works with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP-compatible app.
twoFactor.successBody: 2FA has been enabled successfully. Your account is now protected with an authenticator app at sign-in.
twoFactor.successRecoveryNote: Recovery file download is not available yet.

profileSettings.figmaSubtitle: Your investor profile, watchlist, and regulatory details.
profileSettings.settingsAreaSubtitle: Manage password, two-factor sign-in, active sessions, and notifications.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Manage and monitor where you are currently signed in.
sessions.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
sessions.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
sessions.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
sessions.confirmBody: This will immediately revoke all sessions except your current device. Any other EtStockX sessions on other devices will be logged out.
sessions.securityBody: Revoke any session you do not recognize. If you suspect account compromise, change your password immediately and enable two-factor authentication.

changePassword.cardDescription: Confirm your current password, then choose a new one that meets platform security rules.
changePassword.rulesHint: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
changePassword.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

twoFactor.pageDescription: Protect your investor account with a time-based code from an authenticator app. Recommended for anyone trading or holding sensitive financial information on EtStockX.
twoFactor.bannerDisabled: MFA is currently disabled. Your account is at higher risk. Enable two-factor authentication to better protect your account.
twoFactor.bannerEnabled: Two-factor authentication is on. Your account is protected with TOTP (time-based one-time passwords) at sign-in.
twoFactor.disableCardBody: Disabling 2FA removes the extra step at login. Only continue if you understand the security impact.
twoFactor.disablePasswordRequired: Enter your portal password to disable 2FA.
twoFactor.methodBody: Use Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, or any compatible TOTP app.
twoFactor.recoveryBody: Recovery codes help you regain access if you lose your phone. Store them somewhere safe and offline.
twoFactor.recoveryUnavailable: Recovery code download is not available from the API yet.
twoFactor.asideBody: Layer strong authentication on top of encrypted sessions. Two-factor authentication materially reduces account takeover risk.
twoFactor.setupCardSubtitle: Confirm your identity, link an authenticator app, and verify the first code.
twoFactor.setupPasswordHint: Your password is sent to start MFA setup. MFA stays off until you enter a valid app code on the next step. Your password is not kept in the browser after you leave this page.
twoFactor.scanTitle: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
twoFactor.scanBody: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or Authy) and scan the code below to link your account.
twoFactor.otpHint: Enter the code from your app. The server will verify it and turn on MFA for your account.
twoFactor.otpIncomplete: Enter all 6 digits from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.otpInvalid: That code was not accepted. Try a new code from your app.
twoFactor.secretInvalid: The secret from the server could not be read. Go back and try again, or contact support.
twoFactor.totpFooter: Works with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP-compatible app.
twoFactor.successBody: 2FA has been enabled successfully. Your account is now protected with an authenticator app at sign-in.
twoFactor.successRecoveryNote: Recovery file download is not available yet.

dashboard.onboardingLead: Welcome to your Investor Portal. Complete your setup to begin exploring the brokerage market.
dashboard.onboardingTitle: Complete your profile to start trading
dashboard.onboardingBody: We need a few more details to activate your account and comply with regulatory requirements. This usually takes less than 5 minutes.
dashboard.shortcutListingsDesc: Explore available assets and opportunities in the market.
dashboard.shortcutBrokersDesc: Connect with verified professionals to facilitate your trades.
dashboard.activatedSubtitle: Here's a summary of your trading activity.
dashboard.recentRequestsEmpty: No requests yet. Browse listings to get started.

listings.explorerSubtitle: Browse and filter available shares on the market.
listings.browseSubtitle: Browse active stock listings from verified brokers.
listings.signInBody: Create an account or sign in to browse the market catalog and save listings to your watchlist.
listings.activateBody: Finish investor activation to view listings and trade.
listings.aiSearchPlaceholder: Search listings in English or Amharic — e.g. "Banking shares under ETB 200"
listings.filtersHint: Refine by security, sector, price, and minimum quantity.
listings.predictionUnavailable: No forecast yet. Generate one when enough price history exists, or wait for automatic updates after listings and reference prices change.
listings.emptyBody: Try different keywords or browse all listings. Check your spelling or use broader search terms to find available stocks.
listings.watchlistLocked: Activate your profile to use the watchlist
listings.loadError: Could not load listings. Try again.

securities.catalogSubtitle: Platform-listed instruments with reference prices, price history, and AI forecasts.
securities.signInBody: Sign in to browse the securities catalog.
securities.priceHistoryHint: Recent snapshots recorded when listings are published or reference prices are updated.
securities.historyEmpty: No price snapshots yet for this security.

brokers.title: Brokers
brokers.subtitle: Browse verified, ECMA-licensed brokers on the EtStockX platform.
brokers.searchMinChars: Type at least {count} characters to search the directory.
brokers.sectorFilterDisabledDuringSearch: Sector filters apply to the full directory browse only.
brokers.noBioLong: This broker has not added a profile description yet.
brokers.loadError: Could not load brokers. Try again.
brokers.signInBody: Sign in to browse the verified broker directory.
brokers.notFound: This broker profile could not be found.
brokers.credentialSecondaryIssuer: Ethiopian Capital Market Authority (ECMA) supervised intermediary
brokers.requestCtaBody: Initiate a formal buy or sell interest. {name} is currently accepting new institutional mandates and block trade inquiries through the platform.
brokers.requestCtaFootnote: Choose a listing or describe your interest on the market page; your request will be routed to brokers you select.
brokers.activateCardTitle: Activate your account to submit requests
brokers.activateCardBody: Complete your investor profile first to start working with {name} and other brokers.
brokers.nonInvestorRequestBody: Formal buy and sell interest requests are available to signed-in investor (client) accounts.
brokers.availableBody: This broker is accepting new buy and sell interest requests through the platform.
brokers.requestViaTrade: Start from Listings or My Requests to connect with this broker.
brokers.unavailableBody: This broker is not currently accepting new requests.
brokers.contactEmailPlaceholder: Contact details are shared when you begin a formal request through the platform.
brokers.contactLocationPlaceholder: Office location will appear here when provided by the broker.
brokers.contactLanguagesPlaceholder: Languages: available through your broker once connected.

onboarding.title: Complete Your Profile
onboarding.subtitle: We need a few more details to activate your investor account.
onboarding.step1Body: Your email is verified and your account is secured. Continue to provide identity and banking details required by regulators.
onboarding.legalNamePlaceholder: As it appears on your ID
onboarding.dematAccountHint: A demat (dematerialized) account holds your shares in electronic form at the Ethiopian Securities Exchange (ESX). Your broker uses it to settle buy and sell trades—enter the account number they assigned to you.
onboarding.riskConservativeDesc: Prioritize capital preservation over high returns.
onboarding.riskModerateDesc: Balance between potential growth and income.
onboarding.riskGrowthDesc: Accept higher risk for potentially higher returns.
onboarding.riskAggressiveDesc: Maximize long-term growth, comfortable with volatility.
onboarding.successBody: Your investor profile has been submitted for activation. You can continue exploring listings while compliance processes your details.
onboarding.sessionNoticeBody: For your security, access tokens expire after about 15 minutes of use—stay active or sign in again if prompted. Have your ID ready before contacting support for faster verification.

myProfile.title: My Profile
myProfile.personalSectionHint: Keep your contact details accurate so brokers can reach you.
myProfile.personalDetailsSubtitle: Update your basic profile information and preferences.
myProfile.legalNameLocked: Contact support to change legal name.
myProfile.phoneHint: Phone updates require verification — contact support.
myProfile.securityBody: Use a strong password unique to EtStockX. MFA options will appear here when enabled on your account.
myProfile.bankDesc: Settlement account used when coordinating trades with brokers.
myProfile.dematAccountHint: A demat (dematerialized) account holds your shares in electronic form at the Ethiopian Securities Exchange (ESX). Your broker uses it to settle buy and sell trades.
myProfile.documentsBody: Upload flows will appear here when enabled by your administrator.

requests.title: My Requests
requests.subtitle: Track all your buy and sell requests across the market.
requests.lockedBody: Complete your investor profile to submit and track trade requests.
requests.emptyBody: Browse listings to find stocks you're interested in, or connect with a broker to start trading.
requests.proposalBanner: {count, plural, one {You have # proposal waiting for your response.} other {You have # proposals waiting for your response.}}

requestDetail.needActivation: Complete your profile to view request details.
requestDetail.notFound: This request could not be loaded.
requestDetail.heading: Request #{code}
requestDetail.receiptDisabledHint: Receipt download will be available from a future release.
requestDetail.filledBanner: This request has been filled. No further actions required.

createRequest.title: Create Request
createRequest.subtitle: Initiate a new order to buy or sell instruments.
createRequest.sellCardDesc: I want to offer my shares.
createRequest.pricePlaceholder: ETB — leave blank for market price
createRequest.lockedBody: Complete your investor profile to submit trade requests.
createRequest.errorSecurity: Please select a security from the catalog.
createRequest.errorQuantity: Enter a valid quantity greater than zero.
createRequest.errorPrice: Enter a valid price or leave the field blank.
createRequest.securityHintBuy: Pick the listed share you want to buy.
createRequest.securityHintSell: Pick the listed share you want to sell.
createRequest.listingPrefillNote: Buying from a listing: security, broker, and price are pre-filled from that listing.

requestNegotiation.rejectConfirm: Reject this proposal? You can continue negotiating afterward.

messages.subtitle: Secure conversations with brokers about your requests and listings.
messages.emptySubtitle: Start from the broker directory or your requests. Threads appear here once you exchange messages with a broker.

watchlist.viewUnavailableHint: This listing is not active or could not be loaded from the catalog.

profile.brokerPendingDesc: Your broker profile is under compliance review. You can continue preparing your public directory information.

shell.overviewPageSubtitle: Platform-wide users, trade activity, and trends from the last 30 days.
shell.brokerPageSubtitle: Review pending broker and dealer applications from the IAM queue.
shell.listingsPageSubtitle: Approve, reject, hide, or request clarification on listings awaiting moderation.
shell.auditPageSubtitle: Filter and review compliance and admin actions recorded by the platform.
shell.securitiesPageSubtitle: Create and maintain platform securities, reference prices, and listing eligibility.
shell.manageAdminsPageSubtitle: Super Admin workspace for administrator accounts, invitations, resets, and deactivation.
shell.manageAdminsPlaceholderDescription: Connect this page to /api/v1/admin/users and /api/v1/admin/users/invitations to list admins, invite new admins, revoke invitations, trigger password resets, and deactivate accounts.
shell.placeholderDescription: This area is intentionally empty. Add your own content and data wiring when you are ready.

kpis.totalUsersHint: All IAM accounts on the platform.
kpis.totalBrokersHint: Users with Broker or Dealer role.
kpis.totalAdminsHint: Users with Admin or Super Admin role.
kpis.openBuyRequestsHint: Non-terminal buy requests in the pipeline.
kpis.openSellRequestsHint: Non-terminal sell requests in the pipeline.

charts.registrationsHint: User sign-ups per time bucket in the selected period.
charts.tradeRequestsHint: Buy and sell requests created per bucket (green = buy, red = sell).

breakdown.requestsByStatusHint: All-time counts per status and request type.

summary.totalAdminsHint: Current admin users returned by the platform.

summary.pendingInvitationsHint: Invites waiting for recipients to complete signup.

invite.title: Invite administrator
invite.description: Send a secure invitation email to create a new admin account.
invite.helper: The invited admin receives an email to create their account. Preferred language defaults to English if not changed.

invitations.title: Admin invitations
invitations.description: {count, plural, one {# invitation recorded} other {# invitations recorded}}

roster.title: Administrator roster
roster.description: {count, plural, one {# admin account} other {# admin accounts}}

confirm.revokeDescription: This will invalidate the invitation for {email}. The recipient will need a new invite to create an account.
confirm.deactivateDescription: This will deactivate {name} and remove their access to the admin portal.

profile.figmaSubtitle: Your ECMA admin operator identity and security settings.
profile.settingsAreaSubtitle: Manage password, two-factor sign-in, active sessions, and notifications.

account.securityHint: Administrator access is highly privileged. Use a strong unique password, enable two-factor authentication, and review active sessions regularly.
account.linkPasswordBody: Update your credentials via the authenticated change-password endpoint.
account.linkMfaBody: Add TOTP to protect admin sign-in and sensitive actions.
account.profileSectionHint: Your administrator profile from the platform. Upload a photo, then update department, job title, and language.

securities.createDesc: Add a new instrument to the platform catalog. Brokers select it when publishing listings.
securities.editDesc: Update metadata, status, and reference price.
securities.name: Name
securities.selectSecurity: Select a security from the list or create a new one.

wiring.title: Backend & database check
wiring.subtitle: Uses your current admin session — same path as Broker verification and Listing moderation.
wiring.pendingBrokers: {count, plural, one {# pending broker application} other {# pending broker applications}}
wiring.pendingListings: {count, plural, one {# listing awaiting moderation} other {# listings awaiting moderation}}
wiring.auditSamples: {count, plural, one {# dev sample audit row} other {# dev sample audit rows}}
wiring.hintEmpty: All counts are zero: run the API once with ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development and DevSeed:Enabled=true (see appsettings.Development.json). Ensure Next.js API_URL matches the API host/port (default 8080) and restart next dev after changing it. If you use NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL, use the API origin only (e.g. http://localhost:8080) — /api is added automatically.

brokers.title: Pending broker applications
brokers.detailSubtitle: Review submitted broker documents and approve or reject the application.
brokers.reasonLabel: Notes for reject or request more information
brokers.reasonPlaceholder: Required when rejecting or requesting more information (optional for approve).
brokers.reasonRequiredReject: Please provide a reason before rejecting this application.
brokers.pendingSummary: {count, plural, one {# pending application} other {# pending applications}}
brokers.defaultMoreInfoReason: Additional information is required to complete verification.
brokers.notFound: This broker application was not found or has already been processed.

moderation.emptyQueue: No listings are waiting for moderation.
moderation.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {# listing pending} other {# listings pending}}
moderation.selectListing: Select a listing from the queue.
moderation.reasonPlaceholder: Optional context stored with the moderation record.

audit.filtersDescription: Optional: from, to (UTC day bounds), actorId, actionType, entityType.
audit.noResults: No audit logs matched these filters.

errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist, was removed, or the link may be incorrect.

unauthorized.title: Sign in required
unauthorized.description: Your session has expired or you need to sign in before you can view this page.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: You are signed in, but your account does not have permission to open this page.

server.title: Something went wrong
server.description: We hit an unexpected problem on our side. Please try again in a moment.

generic.title: Unexpected error
generic.description: Something went wrong while loading this page. Please try again or return home.
